title: Ya`aziy'el #3268
definition:
Jaaziel = "made bold by God"

 1) one of the Levites appointed by David to perform the musical
    service before the ark
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jaaziel = "made bold by God"

 1) one of the Levites appointed by David to perform the musical
    service before the ark

    NASB:  a Levite
